scripts.dev:full: set "NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_PROFILE_DIR=%CD%\apps\desktop\.electron-profile" && set "NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_CACHE_DIR=%CD%\apps\desktop\.electron-cache" && wait-on tcp:3000 tcp:4000 && electron --user-data-dir=%NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_PROFILE_DIR% --disk-cache-dir=%NEXUSFORGE_DESKTOP_CACHE_DIR% --disable-gpu-shader-disk-cache .
